com.saxonica.ee.stream

Class AccumulatorManagerEE

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.xslt3.instruct.AccumulatorManagerPE
      • com.saxonica.ee.stream.AccumulatorManagerEE
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IAccumulatorManager

    public class AccumulatorManagerEE
extends AccumulatorManagerPE
    Manager for accumulator functions (XSLT 3.0). Like the KeyManager, this is able to maintain data for the same accumulator in multiple executions of a stylesheet: the accumulator data is designed to be available for garbage collection if either the document or the stylesheet is no longer needed.

    This class also performs the role of a function library, handling requests to bind the two accumulator functions.

    • Method Detail

      • registerAccumulatorRules

        public java.util.Map<Accumulator,AccumulatorWatch> registerAccumulatorRules(WatchManager watchManager)
                                                                     throws XPathException
        Register all the rules for all the accumulators with a WatchManager handling events for a streaming pass over a source document
        Parameters:
        watchManager - the WatchManager with which the rules are to be registered
        Returns:
        a map from accumulators to accumulator watches
        Throws:
        XPathException - if an error occurs
